entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2021 and offering spot and derivatives markets through the active Bitunix platform.
entity.notes: Official company material and independent exchange coverage support the 2021 establishment year and continuing operation. The public materials reviewed do not identify a definitive global operating legal entity or domicile, so HEI retains Global origin and medium confidence.

expected.summary: Centralized exchange launched in 2021 and still operating under the Bitunix brand.

changes.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2021 and offering spot and derivatives markets through the active Bitunix platform.
changes.notes: Official company material and independent exchange coverage support the 2021 establishment year and continuing operation. The public materials reviewed do not identify a definitive global operating legal entity or domicile, so HEI retains Global origin and medium confidence.

events.title: Bitunix was established in 2021
events.description: Bitunix was established in 2021 as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange offering spot and derivatives trading.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish the year but not an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

evidence.title: About Bitunix
evidence.notes: Official company page states that Bitunix was established in 2021.

evidence.title: CoinGecko overview of Bitunix
evidence.notes: Independent overview corroborates the Bitunix exchange identity and its 2021 establishment year.

evidence.title: Bitunix official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Bitunix identity and active exchange interface.

evidence.title: Bitunix official verification portal
evidence.notes: Official verification portal corroborates the platform's current domain and official-channel identity.
